calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition To Distribute Funds To Parent Of Angel Wence, To Establish Blocked Account And For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Aug-05-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Luke, for Petitioner Daniela Cruz
The Court stated that he believed a guardianship was necessary because of the periodic payments to be made. Ms. Luke responded that the Petitioner was hoping the Court would permit direct payment of the periodic payments into a blocked account and thereby avoid the necessity for a guardianship. She expressed the concern that under a guardainship, the costs of filings, legal representation, and accountings could result in expenditure of 1/2 of the funds to be received. She stated that the guardian was a low wage employee, and would not qualify for a bond. The Court responded that in view of the length of time over which the payments were to be received and the total amount to be paid, the court oversight through a guardianship was needed, and that there would not need to obtain a bond if the funds were to be directly deposited into a blocked account. The Petition to Distribute Funds is denied.
Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
